items.definition_en: A test where each question has several answers to choose from.
items.example_en: The final exam was a multiple-choice test.

items.definition_en: A test used to decide a student's starting level in a subject.
items.example_en: All new students take a placement test.

items.definition_en: A question on a test that requires a long written answer.
items.example_en: The history exam had an essay question about World War II.

items.definition_en: A process where students judge their own work.
items.example_en: We did a self-assessment before turning in the project.

items.definition_en: A test used to find out what students already know.
items.example_en: The teacher gave a diagnostic test at the start of term.

items.definition_en: A detailed analysis of a single situation or example used in learning.
items.example_en: Students analyzed a case study for their business class.

items.definition_en: A process where classmates give feedback on each other’s work.
items.example_en: She improved her essay after a peer review.

items.definition_en: A test in which students can use textbooks or notes.
items.example_en: We had an open-book test in biology today.

items.definition_en: A big piece of work given at the end of a course.
items.example_en: The final project counts for half our grade.

items.definition_en: An important test given in the middle of a course.
items.example_en: His midterm exam is scheduled for next week.

items.definition_en: A test where students show skills by doing tasks.
items.example_en: The practical exam involves doing a science experiment.

items.definition_en: A test question that can have many different answers.
items.example_en: Teachers like to use open-ended questions to check thinking.

items.definition_en: A test or homework that students do outside the classroom.
items.example_en: The math test was a take-home assignment this week.

items.definition_en: A form used by teachers to note student performance.
items.example_en: The teacher filled out an observation record during the lesson.

items.definition_en: A test question that needs only a brief answer.
items.example_en: There was a short-answer question about the main idea.

items.definition_en: A sheet with exercises for skill practice.
items.example_en: Students completed a practice sheet for extra grammar work.

items.definition_en: A test to check how well students spell words.
items.example_en: We have a spelling test every Friday.

items.definition_en: An assignment where students demonstrate what they can do.
items.example_en: Her performance task was to give a short speech.

items.definition_en: A document where students explain findings or results.
items.example_en: Students must submit a written report with their project.

items.definition_en: A document students fill out to request a new chance at a test.
items.example_en: If you fail the test, you need to submit a retake form.
